# ADR Template

## Purpose

Record architecture decisions.

## Reference When

Use after an architecture decision is accepted.

## AI Agents Must Obey

ADRs must explain context and consequences, not just the final answer.

## Template

```md
# ADR-000: <title>

Status: proposed | accepted | superseded
Date: YYYY-MM-DD
Owner:

## Context

## Decision

## Consequences

## Alternatives Considered

## Follow-Up
```
